name: piwil2
description: Zebrafish germline factor: piwil2 (zili) — Argonaute family, meiotic piRNA pathway. Most vertebrate germline RNA-binding genes (vasa/ddx4, nanos, piwi family) lost one of their two TGD-ohnologs in teleosts under tight dosage selection — useful negative controls when scanning for retained-ohnolog patterns post-WGD.
